raw_consumer_statement:
My complaint is against American Express for its repeated failure to properly investigate and resolve disputes for unauthorized and fraudulent charges on my account. This demonstrates a pattern of siding with merchants without due diligence, even when I have provided clear evidence. 

Specifically, there are three recent instances : CapCut Charges ( Totaling approx. {$90.00} ) : On XX/XX/XXXX, I formally canceled my subscription with XXXX via email and requested a refund for their charge. XXXX refused the refund and has continued to bill my account a recurring charge of approximately {$9.00} per month from XX/XX/XXXX through XX/XX/XXXX. I disputed these charges with American Express and provided my email correspondence with XXXX as proof of cancellation. Despite this evidence and the fact that I have not used their service since cancellation, American Express denied my dispute. 

XXXX XXXX ( {$200.00} ) : Between XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX, a fraudulent and unauthorized charge of {$200.00} from XXXX was posted to my account. I had no direct means of disputing this with XXXX. I filed a dispute with American Express, which was wrongfully denied without any valid reason or explanation, and the charge was upheld. 

XXXX XXXX ( {$15.00} ) : Between XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX, I discovered a recurring monthly charge of {$15.00} per month for an XXXX XXXX subscription that I had not knowingly authorized. Upon discovering this, I disputed the most recent charge with American Express. This dispute was also denied. 

In all cases, American Express has failed in its duty to protect me from unauthorized transactions, ignoring my evidence and enabling merchants to continue to wrongfully charge my account.
